title: LOW-BARRIER SHELTER SERVICES - 211info
text: SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES LOW-BARRIER SHELTER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community shelter, community meals, showers, laundry, and a clothing closet. Case management services in regard to housing, employment, recovery, mental health care, medical treatment, and life goals may be available on a case-by-case basis. 145 NE Revere Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older and females with minor children. Well-behaved pets allowed. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Meals 7 days per week: Breakfast 7am-8am; Lunch Noon-1pm; Dinner 6pm-7pm Shelter check-in 7 days per week: 5:30pm-10pm; assigned beds guaranteed only until 8pm Discussion/instruction hours: Monday-Friday 8am-11am Email (541) 388-2096 - 830-5 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 388-2096 Main phone (541) 388-2096 Ext: 7 Other Development Office Administration (541) 388-2096 Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Scott McCreery [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, and interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Central Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Services: Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Community Shelters Donation Drop Off Points Food Donation Programs Homeless Drop In Centers Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Showers/Baths If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES
